creator: walker_643@yahoo.com
text:
Approximately 10 minutes after bootup, winbindd crashes. I can find no obvious reason for this crash, but it is reproducible. A core dump can be found here:

http://www.sendspace.com/file/uqttr9

Within the last week, this machine has been updated from fbsd 6.2 to 6.3. This crash did not happen prior to this upgrade. The freebsd-upgrade.sh script was used:

$FreeBSD: src/usr.sbin/freebsd-update/freebsd-update.sh,v 1.12 2007/11/16 14:00:22 cperciva Exp $

and all ports were brought current with portsnap and portmanager.

Please let me know if there is anything more I can provide.

How-To-Repeat: Bootup and wait about 10 minutes
